title: verbascum × innominatum
intro: Verbascum × innominatum, a hybrid plant species, is a type of flowering plant in the mullein family, known for its tall spikes of yellow flowers and large, hairy leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is often used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum × innominatum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce coughs, and ease digestive issues, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
